name: Engineering Mathematics
description: Linear algebra, calculus, differential equations, complex variables, probability and numerical methods — the mathematical backbone of every EEE subject.

name: Electric Circuits
description: Network theorems, transient and steady-state analysis, two-port networks, and sinusoidal steady-state.

name: Electromagnetic Fields
description: Coulomb's law, Gauss's law, Laplace/Poisson equations, magnetostatics and Maxwell's equations.

name: Signals and Systems
description: Continuous and discrete signals, LTI systems, Fourier/Laplace/Z transforms, sampling theorem.

name: Electrical Machines
description: Single and three-phase transformers, DC machines, induction and synchronous machines.

name: Power Systems
description: Generation, transmission, distribution, load flow, fault analysis, protection, stability and economics.

name: Control Systems
description: Transfer functions, stability, root locus, Bode/Nyquist, state-space, compensators.

name: Electrical and Electronic Measurements
description: Bridges, potentiometers, PMMC, instrument transformers, digital voltmeters, oscilloscopes.

name: Analog Electronics
description: Diodes, BJTs, MOSFETs, amplifiers, feedback, op-amp circuits, oscillators.

name: Digital Electronics
description: Boolean algebra, combinational and sequential logic, ADC/DAC, microprocessors.

name: Power Electronics
description: Semiconductor devices, rectifiers, choppers, inverters, drives.

name: General Aptitude
description: Verbal and numerical aptitude common to every GATE paper.
